prospects.name: Julian Flanagan
prospects.profile: Age 21, incoming Berkeley Biophysics PhD student, currently out of state
prospects.matchAssessment: EXCELLENT - 5+ year funded program, quiet/tidy, wants year lease with renewal, Aug 1 move-in aligns perfectly, values BART access + parking + peaceful environment. Best prospect to date.
prospects.lastMessage: Mike proposed Sunday virtual tour (04/06 3:47 AM EDT). Julian hasn't read yet. Awaiting confirmation.
prospects.conversationStage: 6 messages in thread. Screening done. Tour scheduling in progress.
prospects.actionNeeded: Awaiting Julian's reply. No action needed unless no response by Monday.

prospects.name: Thomas Thuillier
prospects.profile: Age 55, Senior Scientist at Lawrence Berkeley Lab (staff), French. Seeking 1-year lease (wife joins Aug 2027).
prospects.matchAssessment: EXCELLENT - LBL staff scientist = top-tier income stability. Quiet, respectful, mature. 1-year lease aligns. Single occupant.
prospects.lastMessage: Replied 04/06 12:36 AM via Yahoo to CL relay. Confirmed availability, sent house details, offered tour.
prospects.conversationStage: Initial exchange complete. Awaiting Thomas's response to schedule tour.
prospects.actionNeeded: Awaiting his reply. No action needed.

prospects.name: Jan Schütte-Engel
prospects.profile: Postdoc at UC Berkeley. Wants unfurnished room with hardwood floor.
prospects.matchAssessment: STRONG - UC Berkeley postdoc = stable funding 2-5 years. Specific questions show genuine interest. Downstairs hardwood room is a match.
prospects.lastMessage: Replied 04/06 8:07 AM via Yahoo to CL relay. Confirmed availability, answered flooring question, offered virtual tour.
prospects.conversationStage: Initial exchange complete. Awaiting Jan's response to schedule tour.
prospects.actionNeeded: Awaiting his reply. No action needed.

prospects.name: Julius
prospects.profile: PhD student at UC Berkeley. Found listing via Facebook post. Interested in room starting Aug 1.
prospects.matchAssessment: STRONG - Berkeley PhD student = stable 5+ year funding. Aug 1 move-in aligns perfectly. Active searcher via Facebook groups.
prospects.lastMessage: Julius texted 04/06 12:03 PM asking about tour. Mike replied proposing Sunday in-person. Awaiting confirmation.
prospects.conversationStage: Initial exchange via iMessage. Tour proposed for Sunday. Screening questions still needed.
prospects.actionNeeded: Awaiting Julius's reply. No action needed unless no response by Monday.

7 FB groups reposted (~525K combined member reach)
5 active prospects: Julian (SpareRoom), Thomas (CL, LBL scientist), Jan (CL, postdoc), Julius (FB, PhD), Jack Boyd (FB, grad student)
